evidence_summary: New Node audit script enforces high-precision stale substrings on package.json, extension.js, and production src/**/*.js (excludes *.test.js). Documented in docs/agenthud/stale-reference-audit.md; npm script audit:stale-refs; message-protocol.test.js runs audit subprocess. Baseline 0 violations.
risks: Substring rules may miss renamed stale features or rare false positives if new code legitimately contains a marker string; extend STALE_SUBSTRINGS with care. Docs/ and tests are not fully covered by the scanner.
